violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue at handles of refrigerators. -Residue at light switches of back room. -Some carbon/debris at interior ovens. -Rust/residue at bottom interior of "tips" refrigerator. -Limescale residue at silicone dish drain mats.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Could not locate test strips for chlorine or quat sanitizers.
Food supplies. — --Food item was prepared in private home. -Cake, pie and today's soup were all made by volunteers at their homes.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Steak tip meat is open air thawed throughout the day before being cut for Saturday service.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Black/yellow limescale/debris at interior panel of ice machine.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue at oven handle and carbon at interior bottom. -Grease residue at fronts and handles of lower cabinets near fryer. -Dried food debris at bottom catch tray of bar pizza oven.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of ware wash machine. -Dishwasher found at 118F. -Rinse cycle thermometer showed ~140F before departure. Water in ware wash basin temped at 118F after cycle finished. *Directed staff to manually sanitize dishes until dishwasher is fixed. *Facility has had new elements on-site since Spring but have not yet replaced them.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed staff fill water pitchers at kitchen hand sink.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insects, rodents, or other pests were not controlled in a manner specified in the food service code to minimize their presence within the facility. -Mouse feces in bottom, right side cabinet at bar.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
